title: Doll Room
description:
You enter a hidden room...

It's packed with an array of dolls. Each are unique, their expressions ranging from [green]joy[/green] to [purple]sorrow[/purple], their attire spanning centuries and realms beyond your own.

A [sine][blue]chorus of whispers[/blue][/sine] grows louder and louder until [jitter][red]the dolls are shouting[/red][/jitter] over each other and calling for you...

You must choose one and leave immediately.

options.title: Examine Each and Make the Best Choice

notes: This event provides three options for obtaining a Doll Relic with different costs and selection methods. [gold]Pick at Random[/gold] grants a random relic with no HP cost. [gold]Take Some Time[/gold] costs [red]5 unblockable, unpowered damage[/red] but allows you to choose from 2 of the 3 relics (randomly shuffled). [gold]Examine Each and Make the Best Choice[/gold] costs [red]15 unblockable, unpowered damage[/red] and lets you choose from all 3 available relics. The available relics are [gold]DaughterOfTheWind[/gold], [gold]MrStruggles[/gold], and [gold]BingBong[/gold]. After selecting an option and doll, a unique description for that doll is displayed before the relic is obtained.
